data.title: Bitget has launched USD-margined BSB perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-margined BSB perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: MSX Launches Tokenized Aerospace Stocks with Strong Initial Gains
data.description: MSX has introduced five tokenized U.S. commercial aerospace stocks, which debuted with average gains exceeding 10%. According to NS3.AI, the new listings reflect a positive trend, as 38 out of 39 first-quarter MSX listings also recorded gains. Among the five new tokens, the highest intraday increase reached 27%, indicating robust investor interest and market performance.

data.title: Macquarie Strategist: U.S. May Intensify Military Actions Against Iran
data.description: Macquarie Group's global foreign exchange and interest rate strategist, Thierry Wizman, has indicated that a ceasefire between the United States and Iran is unlikely at this time. According to Jin10, Wizman suggests that the U.S. might escalate its military operations over the next two weeks to pressure Iran into making significant concessions. These military actions are expected to continue until major combat operations achieve success, potentially by mid-April. The conflict appears to have entered a 'negotiation and combat' phase, rather than focusing solely on negotiations or combat.

data.title: STOCKS | European Stock Futures Decline Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: European stock futures experienced a downturn, with the Euro Stoxx 50 index futures falling by 0.6%. According to Jin10, Germany's DAX index futures also saw a decrease of 0.8%, while the UK's FTSE 100 index futures dropped by 0.2%. These movements reflect ongoing market uncertainty and investor caution in the region.

data.title: Vanke Considers Bond Payment Delay and Restructuring
data.description: Distressed developer Vanke is reportedly engaging with bondholders to discuss postponing payment on a note due next month. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is also contemplating a wider restructuring strategy, according to sources familiar with the matter. Vanke's financial challenges have prompted these discussions as it seeks to manage its obligations and explore potential solutions to stabilize its operations.

data.title: U.S. Proposal to Include Cryptocurrency in 401(k) Plans Advances
data.description: A proposal supported by U.S. President Donald Trump to allow the inclusion of cryptocurrency and private equity in 401(k) retirement plans has passed White House review. According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Labor is expected to soon introduce related regulations.

data.title: AI and Energy Transition Spending Predicted to Drive Long-Term Inflation
data.description:
The chief executive of IFM Investors has warned that substantial investments in artificial intelligence and the global shift towards sustainable energy are expected to create inflationary pressures for many years. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential economic impact of these sectors as they continue to evolve and expand.

The executive emphasized that the financial commitments required for AI development and energy transition are significant and could lead to sustained inflation. These sectors are seen as critical drivers of future economic growth, but their expansion may come with challenges, including rising costs.

As governments and companies worldwide invest heavily in AI technologies and renewable energy sources, the demand for resources and infrastructure is likely to increase. This could result in higher prices across various industries, affecting consumers and businesses alike.

The long-term implications of these investments are still unfolding, but the potential for inflationary pressures remains a concern for economists and policymakers. The focus on AI and energy transition reflects a broader trend towards innovation and sustainability, which is reshaping the global economic landscape.

data.title: MSX launched five new US stock tokens in the "space" sector, with an average opening gain of over 10%.
data.description: MSX recently achieved full coverage of popular stocks in the commercial aerospace sector, listing five new tokenized stocks (MNTS.M, SIDU.M, PL.M, BKSY.M, and YSS.M). These stocks saw an average opening gain of over 10%, reaching a high of 27% during the day. Statistics show that 38 out of the 39 new stocks listed on MSX in Q1 recorded gains. By completing asset allocation before the sector's surge, MSX effectively helped users hedge against the risk of asset depreciation due to recent geopolitical factors. Many of the newly listed stocks have recently reached all-time highs.

data.title: Solana Foundation Updates Validator Delegation Program Standards
data.description: The Solana Foundation has announced updates to its validator delegation program, set to be implemented on May 1. According to NS3.AI, these changes aim to enhance the fairness of transaction ordering, address issues related to censorship, optimize block production timing, and manage validator concentration across Autonomous System Numbers (ASNs) and data centers. The foundation's initiative seeks to improve the overall efficiency and decentralization of the Solana network.

data.title: Malaysia to Cut Fuel Subsidies Amid Rising Oil Prices
data.description: Malaysia is set to decrease the monthly subsidized entitlement for its most popular fuel as oil prices climb due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's decision to adjust subsidies in response to the global economic impact of the regional unrest. This move comes as Malaysia seeks to manage its fiscal budget and address the challenges posed by fluctuating oil prices. The reduction in subsidies is part of broader efforts to ensure economic stability and mitigate the effects of external factors on the domestic market.

data.title: New Compression Technique Raises Concerns for Memory and Storage Shares
data.description: Shares of companies producing computer memory and storage products experienced a decline amid concerns about demand. Bloomberg posted on X that the drop followed the announcement by Google researchers of a new compression technique. However, analysts suggest this development might be a temporary setback rather than a significant threat to the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 71,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.50% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 26, 2026, 02:18 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 71,000 USDT and is now trading at 70,938.273438 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.50% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Circle unfroze one of the 16 blacklisted USDC wallets.
data.description: On-chain investigator ZachXBT posted on the X platform that Circle has unfroze one of the 16 previously frozen wallets. This wallet, linked to Goated.com and located at address 0x61f...e543, currently holds 130,966 USDC. ZachXBT stated that more affected wallets are expected to be restored soon. Previously, Circle froze the USDC balances in 16 hot wallets linked to multiple unrelated companies. ZachXBT claimed the freeze was related to an undisclosed US civil case and criticized the case for being shelved without providing any legal basis for the freeze, calling it potentially the most unreasonable freeze he has seen in his five-year investigative career. MetaMask security researcher Taylor Monahan also criticized Circle on the X platform, stating that this is not the first time Circle has improperly frozen wallets and lacks accountability and recourse mechanisms. Circle has not yet made any public comment regarding the wallets involved or the legal basis for the freeze.

data.title: WeChat Video Platform Sets Guidelines for Financial Content
data.description: WeChat's video platform has released a new set of guidelines for financial content creators, emphasizing the importance of neutrality, professionalism, and verifiable information. According to Jin10, the platform explicitly prohibits eight types of content, including public stock recommendations, promises of returns, malicious disparagement, illegal services, forged endorsements, homogeneous address content, high-risk projects like NFTs, and video traffic diversion. Violations of these guidelines will result in actions based on the severity of the infraction, such as limiting video reach, deleting videos, revoking account verification, or banning accounts.

data.title: Bank of Korea Warns of Potential Market Risks Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: The Bank of Korea reported that the nation's financial system was largely stable in March. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns that rising tensions in the Middle East and existing structural vulnerabilities could heighten risks in the markets. The central bank emphasized the importance of monitoring these developments closely to mitigate potential impacts on the financial system.

data.title: Australia's Natural Gas Shortage Delayed by Improved Battery Technology and Grid Investment
data.description: Australia's anticipated natural gas shortage has been postponed by a year due to advancements in battery technology and increased investment in the main electricity grid. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how these developments have contributed to stabilizing the energy supply. The improvements in battery efficiency and the strengthening of the grid infrastructure have played a crucial role in mitigating the immediate risks associated with the natural gas supply. This delay provides Australia with more time to address potential shortages and explore sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Codex App to Continue Development, Project Lead Says
data.description: OpenAI's Codex project lead has confirmed that the Codex App will remain in development. According to Jin10, the team is dedicating more resources than ever to enhance the application. The project lead expressed confidence that the app will soon achieve significant improvements.

data.title: China's SMEs Face Challenges Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is significantly impacting the prospects of numerous small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that despite these challenges, Beijing is striving to maintain a composed demeanor as it prepares for an upcoming summit between Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump. The meeting is expected to address various geopolitical and economic issues, with the Iran situation likely to be a key topic of discussion. As tensions continue to influence global markets, China's SMEs are navigating an increasingly complex landscape.

data.title: Solana's Meteora Launches DLMM Feature for Enhanced Liquidity Analysis
data.description: On March 26, Solana's liquidity protocol Meteora announced the launch of its chart-based DLMM range setting feature. According to BlockBeats, this new functionality allows users to identify support and resistance levels and precisely view liquidity positions on charts. The update aims to enhance the analytical capabilities for traders within the Solana ecosystem.

data.title: Reflection Seeks $2.5 Billion Funding to Reach $25 Billion Valuation
data.description: Reflection, a startup backed by Nvidia, is in discussions to secure $2.5 billion in funding. According to ChainCatcher, this financing round aims to elevate the company's valuation to $25 billion.
